Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is off calendar and dissolved. Case was removed from the Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order To Arbitration And For An Order To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed;
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ARNTZ BUILDERS, INC, AND PLAINTIFF FREAS PLASTERING COMPANY, INC'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ARBITRATION AND FOR AN ORDER TO STAY PROCEEDINGS IN PENDING ACTION UNTIL ARBITRATION COMPLETED is granted pursuant to stipulation. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Continued To Jun-24-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/24/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
